1w.label: General / top-level
1w.summary: Reliability and clean-up across the core playback plumbing — safer object-lifetime handling and a thread-safety fix in media logging. Also lands groundwork for two notable web features: **picture-in-picture** (popping a video out into a floating window) and the new Audio Session API that pages use to declare how their sound should behave.
patch_subjects: Change MediaDecoderStateMachine::CreateAudioSink to return its newly-allocated result as an already_AddRefed.
Simplify MediaDecoder::ConnectMirrors() now that it's clearer that its parameter is always mDecoderStateMachine.
Change MediaDecoder::CreateStateMachine() to return already_AddRefed.
Hold strong ref while calling nsIStreamListener methods
Part 1: Add Subtype() method to MediaExtendedMIMEType that returns the MIME string subtype.
Add missing ResultVariant.h include in dom/media/MediaData.h
Implement Picture In Picture API

1w.label: Media Control / Session
1w.summary: A major build-out of audio-session handling — the system that tracks which tab is playing sound and keeps it coordinated. It adds a parent-side model of every audible source, computes the active session per the spec, fires change events, and routes media keys (including to sources that can't be directly controlled), all backed by extensive new tests.
patch_subjects: Part 3: Browser test for AudioSession state transitions end-to-end.
Part 2: Plumb AudioSession state changes from parent to content and dispatch statechange.
Part 1: Move AudioSession-related gtests to a dedicated file.
Part 3: Wire the cross-session inactivation algorithm into state and type mutations.
Part 2: Implement the §5.4 update-all-audio-session-states algorithm.
Part 1: Add audio-session state field and selected-audio-session tracking.
Move parent-side audio-session state into a dedicated owner.

1w.label: Decoder / platform backends
1w.summary: Decoder and platform-backend work centred on high-dynamic-range (HDR) video: HDR metadata now flows through the FFmpeg, Direct3D and Apple decoding paths. Also adds **hardware-accelerated video decoding via Vulkan**, better HEVC handling, and multichannel Opus encoding.
patch_subjects: Stop checking for a non-zero numSPS when comparing extra data.
Add gtest for H265::CompareExtraData equality of SPS-less configs
Part 7: Initialize Android utility PEMs in PEMFactory as per media.android-media-codec.enabled

1w.label: Tests
1w.summary: Test and fuzzing maintenance — new crashtests and coverage (key-system capabilities, a Vorbis preroll crash) plus refreshed fuzz tolerances for updated drivers. _No user-facing change._
patch_subjects: Adjust fuzz for Skia m149.
Bump Android fuzz bound and drop stale macOS version annotations for color_quads reftests
Use quad shaders for images when TEXTURE_RECT isn't required.

1w.label: Media Source Extensions (MSE)
1w.summary: Added tests for HEVC video delivered through Media Source Extensions (MSE) — the technology streaming sites use for adaptive playback — including a script to generate the test fixtures.
patch_subjects: Add MSE HEVC SPS-less CMAF test
Add generator script for HEVC test fixtures under dom/media/mediasource/test/

1w.label: HLS
1w.summary: Early groundwork for HLS live streaming, expanding the interface it uses to open network connections. _Not yet user-visible._
patch_subjects: p1: expand HLS resource callbacks interface for opening necko HTTP channels.

1w.label: HTMLMediaElement
1w.summary: Made a media element's muted content attribute act as a fallback for the muted state, so muting behaves more predictably.
patch_subjects: Part 1: Make the muted content attribute a fallback for the muted state.

1w.label: Media Capabilities
1w.summary: A big push on Media Capabilities — the API sites use to check whether your device can smoothly play given media. It adds support for querying WebRTC (real-time video-calling) codecs and hardware acceleration, reworks the internal support checks, and for now rejects an unsupported WebRTC scalability option so call sites fall back cleanly.
patch_subjects: Part 4: Update Media Capabilities to reject WebRTC scalabilityMode until Bug 1571470 lands

1w.label: Media IPC
1w.summary: Modernised the media inter-process plumbing onto safer reference-counted channels for remote decoders and the Media Foundation DRM/engine. _No visible change._
patch_subjects: Use ContiguousEnumSerializerInclusive with ParamTraits<mozilla::MediaDataDecoder::PropertyName>

1w.label: Web Audio
1w.summary: Maintenance of Web Audio (in-browser sound) — a shutdown crash fix, audio-fingerprinting hardening, and better handling of sample-rate drift when decoding audio. Also connects Web Audio to the media-control system.
patch_subjects: Turn on clang-tidy's performance-trivially-destructible pass

1m.label: Media Capabilities
1m.summary: A big push on Media Capabilities — the API sites use to check whether your device can smoothly play given media. It adds support for querying WebRTC (real-time video-calling) codecs and hardware acceleration, reworks the internal support checks, and for now rejects an unsupported WebRTC scalability option so call sites fall back cleanly.
patch_subjects: Part 4: Update Media Capabilities to reject WebRTC scalabilityMode until Bug 1571470 lands
Initialize MediaCapabilitiesDecodingInfo::mPowerEfficient unconditionally before lambda capture
Make MediaCapabilities mime type parameter handling for webrtc permissive, for now.
Add an allowlist for the MediaCapabilities webrtc type.
Add an allowlist for MediaCapabilities legacy mode.
Move MediaCapabilities webrtc.enabled pref to BehaviorConfig.
Change MediaCapabilities validation prefs to a single legacy pref and put it in a struct for once-per-request sampling.
Fix worker thread lifetimes in Media Capabilities
Part 20: Add heuristic and overrides to determine Media Capabilities smooth attribute for WebRTC.
Part 18: Remove vestigial CheckAudio/VideoConfiguration functions.
Part 17: Overhaul Media Capabilities EncodingInfo creation to use unified support checks and add WebRTC support.
Part 16: Update Media Capabilities DecodingInfo creation to use unified support checks and add WebRTC support.
Part 15: Add hardware acceleration encode support checks to Media Capabilities.
Part 14: Add CodecSupportState class to store support for MediaCapabilities encode/decode for both audio and video.
Part 13: Update CheckTypeFor* functions to use MediaExtendedMIMEType
Part 12: Add GetThreadForAsyncRequesthelper to use when checking Media Capabilities support information.
Part 11: Add fmt::formatters for Media Capabilities video/audio encode/decode configurations and info.
Part 8: Add prefs to toggle Media Capabilities color space / scalability checks.
Part 7: Add WebRTC and colorGamut/transferFunction support checks to CheckMIMETypeSupport.
Part 6: Add colorGamut and transferFunction validation functions to be used in MediaCapabilities MIME type support check.
Part 5: Add WebRTC-specific scalabilityMode check to Media Capabilities video configuration validation.
Part 4: Add video/mpeg and audio/mpeg to container list for Media Capabilities validation.
Part 3: Add WebRTC media type check, add detail to comment with links to ongoing spec discussions.
Part 2: Add pref to enable/disable WebRTC type support in the Media Capabilities API.

1m.label: Media Control / Session
1m.summary: A major build-out of audio-session handling — the system that tracks which tab is playing sound and keeps it coordinated. It adds a parent-side model of every audible source, computes the active session per the spec, fires change events, and routes media keys (including to sources that can't be directly controlled), all backed by extensive new tests.

Part 1: Add audio-session state field and selected-audio-session tracking.
Move parent-side audio-session state into a dedicated owner.
Part 4: Expose the effective audio-session type via WebIDL and cover with browser tests.
Part 3: Compute the effective audio-session type per the spec algorithm.
Part 2: Implement the per-context audio-session type selection algorithm.
Part 1: Plumb audioSession.type setter to the parent process.
Part 5: Add a browser test for active-session stability when an audible iframe appears.
Part 4: Add gtest coverage for the consolidated audibility store.
Part 3: Rename intra-tab audio-focus owner to active audible controllable context.
Part 2: Track every audible source in a single parent-side store.
Part 1: Tag every audio source with its audio session type.
Part 5: Cross-source audio focus competition mochitests.
Part 4: Add audiblechange event on MediaController.
Part 1: Route Stop key to uncontrollable receivers.
Add Pref to expose media metadata in private browsing
Add uncontrollable audio source tracking to MediaController.
Use MakeRefPtr and MakeAndAddRef instead of 'new' to allocate gfxDrawable instances.

1m.label: Decoder / platform backends
1m.summary: Decoder and platform-backend work centred on high-dynamic-range (HDR) video: HDR metadata now flows through the FFmpeg, Direct3D and Apple decoding paths. Also adds **hardware-accelerated video decoding via Vulkan**, better HEVC handling, and multichannel Opus encoding.

1m.label: Tests (gtest)
1m.summary: A large batch of automated unit tests across the media code — image-buffer validation, HEVC support invariants, HDR-metadata plumbing — plus re-enabling several previously-skipped tests. _Internal quality work._

1m.label: WebM
1m.summary: Fixed the WebM/Matroska demuxer so Opus audio tracks are extracted correctly.

1m.label: WebVTT / captions
1m.summary: Fixed a bug that could stop WebVTT subtitles and captions from loading.
patch_subjects: Fix HTMLTrackElement::LoadResource when load gets clobbered.

1w.label: WebRTC web API (RTCPeerConnection)
1w.summary: Work on the public WebRTC API pages use (RTCPeerConnection, RTCDataChannel) — fixes to connection teardown and data-channel worker lifetimes, exposing the default audio/video codecs, enabling transport-wide congestion control for audio, and general modernisation.
patch_subjects: Remove the cache-clearing side effect of TS_NONE.
Fire closed updates for transports that are torn down, even if they were never active.
fix webrtc-stats transportId references
Use 'std::make_unique' for allocation (instead of 'new') for std::unique_ptr-typed variables, in dom/media/webrtc/.
Use MakeRefPtr to do allocation for more RefPtr variables in dom/media/webrtc/.
Use MakeRefPtr to do allocation for various RefPtr variables in dom/media/webrtc/.
Enable transport-cc for audio codecs;
Avoid sending null data to NewArrayBufferWithUserOwnedContents()

1w.label: Connection transport (ICE / DTLS)
1w.summary: Improvements to the WebRTC connection layer (ICE/DTLS) — richer connection statistics such as TLS version, cipher and candidate details, plus threading and ownership clean-ups.
patch_subjects: Use 'MakeUnique' for allocation (instead of 'new') for UniquePtr-typed variables, in dom/media/webrtc/.
Move originAttributes to socket base class nsASocketHandler
Implement RTCTransportStats.tlsVersion/dtlsCipher/srtpCipher
implement (some of) RTCTransportStats
Add more IPCMessageUtils specializations for STL types
Make this mainthread only.

1w.label: libwebrtc integration
1w.summary: Glue between Firefox and the upstream libwebrtc library — better gating of hardware H.264 encode/decode, audio bitrate and bandwidth configuration, and more accurate Media Capabilities answers for real-time codecs.
patch_subjects: Part 6: Integrate H.264 FMTP parser usage into Media Capabilities and WebrtcGmpVideoCodec support functions
Part 2: Improve accuracy of Media Capabilities support queries based on media resolution/framerate. Uses PDM/PEMFactory checks to more easily allow additional verification in the future.
Bug 2040478 (MOZ) - Remove the CallBasicStats override.
Map webrtc::H264Level to H264_LEVEL by enumerator name
Configure audio send stream bitrate range and BWE allocation.

1w.label: Session negotiation (SDP)
1w.summary: Refactoring of the SDP layer (the text format that negotiates a call's media) toward safer memory ownership, with formatting and lint clean-up.
patch_subjects: Use MakeUnique instead of 'new' to populate UniquePtrs in dom/media/webrtc/{jsep,sdp}.
Change SdpAttributeList::SetAttribute() and its callers to transfer ownership using UniquePtr.
Change SdpAttribute::Clone() to provide the clone in a UniquePtr.
In SdpAttributeList concrete classes, store attributes in UniquePtrs instead of raw pointers.

1w.summary: Fixes in the call-negotiation engine (JSEP) around when media sections are associated, plus a code-quality check.

Only attempt to associate transceivers when remote m-section is receiving.
Activate performance-inefficient-string-concatenation clang-tidy check

1w.label: WebRender (GPU compositor)
1w.summary: Heavy iteration on WebRender, the GPU-based page renderer — a large migration of primitives (images, borders, gradients) onto a unified 'quad shader' path, render-graph improvements, and HDR video-overlay fixes.
patch_subjects: Refactor text runs to store glyphs with device offsets
Port the normal border code path from brush to quad.
Implement image cutouts using quad shaders.
Fix incorrect segment if rounded rect clip and prim have different clips.
Don't fall back to brushes when image properties are missing.
Use the quad path for images with a base color.
Undo the windows qualcomm workaround for quad base color.
Use UV rects provided by external image instead of the graph.
Prevent to disable video underlay in TileCacheInstance::post_update() if video is HDR
Reduce ps_quad_box_shadow varying count from 15 to 13
Implement support for TextureRect images with ps_quad_textured.
Use quad shaders for images when TEXTURE_RECT isn't required.
Add ps_quad_textured variants for the different sampler types.
Move per-rect snapping from scene build to frame build.

1m.label: WebRender (GPU compositor)
1m.summary: Heavy iteration on WebRender, the GPU-based page renderer — a large migration of primitives (images, borders, gradients) onto a unified 'quad shader' path, render-graph improvements, and HDR video-overlay fixes.
patch_subjects: Refactor text runs to store glyphs with device offsets
Port the normal border code path from brush to quad.
Implement image cutouts using quad shaders.
Fix incorrect segment if rounded rect clip and prim have different clips.
Don't fall back to brushes when image properties are missing.
Use the quad path for images with a base color.
Undo the windows qualcomm workaround for quad base color.
Use UV rects provided by external image instead of the graph.
Prevent to disable video underlay in TileCacheInstance::post_update() if video is HDR
Reduce ps_quad_box_shadow varying count from 15 to 13
Implement support for TextureRect images with ps_quad_textured.
Use quad shaders for images when TEXTURE_RECT isn't required.
Add ps_quad_textured variants for the different sampler types.
Move per-rect snapping from scene build to frame build.
Fix nearest sampling in the SWGL fast path for quad_textured.
Decompose linear gradients at prepare time.
Encode image stretch_size as per-axis FillsPrim/Explicit.
Avoid unnecessary texture update processing when update_list is empty
Pt 2 - Insert zero-offset OffsetFrame children for scroll and sticky
Pt 1 - Add OffsetFrame spatial node kind to WebRender
Don't use quads for underlay images.
Use quad shaders for stacking context snapshots with adjusted bounds.
Pt 3 - Remove SpatialTreeItemKey from public WebRender API
Pt 2 - Remove SpatialNodeUid from scene-tree interner
Pt 1 - Remove dead SpatialNode.uid internal counter
Slightly increase fuzziness for reftests/text/text-fixed-slice.yaml
Remove unused opaque_rect from PrimitiveCluster
Adapt consumers to http 1.x, hyper 1.x, and windows-sys HANDLE type changes.
Vendor upgraded http, hyper, warp crates and their dependencies.
Update to Glean v67.3.2
Anchor text-run interning on the run pen origin
Avoid all warnings about built_frame not being used.
Inflate drop-shadow source-rect by blur margin in get_surface_rects.
Do frustum clipping in the root space of the preserve-3d context.
Add support for tiled images via quad shaders.
Support non-premultiplied images with ps_quad_textured.
Add support for blend modes in the quad shader infrastructure.
Fix wrench png.
Change plane splitting to operate in root space of preserve-3d context
Add support for task sub-rects in the render task graph.
Update to Glean v67.3.1
Reenable quad shaders for images in simple cases.
Properly handle stretch_size when it is larger than the prim local rect.
Emit a stable transform fingerprint for perspective-crossing rects in WebRender invalidation.
Align box-shadow analytical clip with rounded prim_rect
Pt 23 - Move prim_size from template to PrimitiveInstance.prim_rect
Pt 22 - Per-instance GPU addresses for NormalBorder/ImageBorder
Pt 21 - Build LineDecorationCacheKey per-frame
Pt 20 - Move may_need_repetition off PrimTemplateCommonData
Pt 19 - Encode gradient stretch_size as a ratio of prim_size
